name: io.qent.broxy/appium
title: Appium
description: Mobile automation MCP server for Android and iOS testing via Appium sessions and device tools.

environmentVariables.name: ANDROID_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Android SDK root path for Android device automation.

environmentVariables.name: CAPABILITIES_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to capabilities JSON used to initialize Appium sessions.

environmentVariables.name: SCREENSHOTS_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory where screenshots are written by the server.
